title: Maigret and the St. Fiacre Case
writer: Georges Simenon, Jean Delannoy, Rodolphe-Maurice Arlaud
actors: Jean Gabin, Michel Auclair, Valentine Tessier
plot: The Countess de Saint-Fiacre, having received a terrible anonymous letter predicting her imminent death, summons Commissioner Maigret in the hope that he can protect her and save her from a secret ill-wisher.
